text: 🇮🇷 🚢 🆘 Second ship reports attack in strait of Hormuz . The UK Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) said it received a report of a second ship coming under attack in the strait of Hormuz. A cargo ship was fired at about 8 nautical miles northwest of Iran, UKMTO said, although it did not say where the shots were fired from. In a report issued this morning, UKMTO said: “A master of an outbound cargo ship reports having been fired upon and is now stopped in the water. Crew are safe and accounted for. There is no reported damage to the vessel. @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🚢 🆘 第二艘船只报告在霍尔木兹海峡遇袭。英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）表示，收到第二艘船只在霍尔木兹海峡遇袭的报告。UKMTO称，一艘货船在伊朗西北约8海里处遭到射击，但未说明射击来源。在今早发布的一份报告中，UKMTO表示：“一艘出境货船的船长报告称遭到射击，目前已停船。船员安全且人数清点无误。船只未报告受损。” @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel IDF footage on the elimination of Khamis Muhammad Khamis Qassas, an October 7th terrorist who infiltrated Kibbutz Nir Oz, after he approached Israeli forces near the Yellow Line in southern Gaza posing an immediate threat. The military says Qassas had been leading terrorists toward IDF positions and planning attacks on troops and civilians throughout the war. IDF: A terrorist who infiltrated Kibbutz Nir Oz on October 7th was eliminated near the Yellow Line in southern Gaza yesterday. Khamis Muhammad Khamis Qassas had been directing attacks against Israeli troops and civilians throughout the war. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046880232641032555/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列国防军（IDF）关于消灭哈米斯·穆罕默德·哈米斯·卡萨斯（Khamis Muhammad Khamis Qassas）的视频片段。此人是10月7日潜入尼尔奥兹基布兹（Kibbutz Nir Oz）的恐怖分子，在加沙南部黄线附近接近以色列军队并构成直接威胁后被击毙。军方称，卡萨斯在整个战争期间一直带领恐怖分子向以军阵地推进，并策划针对部队和平民的袭击。以色列国防军：一名10月7日潜入尼尔奥兹基布兹的恐怖分子昨日在加沙南部黄线附近被击毙。哈米斯·穆罕默德·哈米斯·卡萨斯在整个战争期间一直指挥针对以色列部队和平民的袭击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046880232641032555/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel FACT CHECK: This image is from August 18, 2020. A Houthi sniper shot a girl named Rowaida in Taiz, Yemen while she was carrying water home. The original post is still live on X. @Partisangirl recycled a 6 year old Houthi atrocity photo and blamed Israel. The truth got 397 likes. The lie got 60,000. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）事实核查：这张图片拍摄于2020年8月18日。一名胡塞武装狙击手在也门塔伊兹射杀了一名正在运水回家的女孩，名叫罗瓦伊达（Rowaida）。原始帖子仍在X上。@Partisangirl 翻出了一张6年前胡塞武装暴行的照片并将其归咎于以色列。真相获得了397个赞，而谎言获得了60,000个赞。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @KToropin : NEW: The U.S. Navy is reviewing the design and costs of the Ford-class aircraft carrier and @SECNAV is not ruling out canceling future ships of the class. When asked if the review could scrap the Fords, Phelan said only that “it’s too early to say, but we will have carriers.” tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @KToropin：最新消息：美国海军正在审查福特级航空母舰的设计和成本，美国海军部长（@SECNAV）不排除取消该级未来舰艇的可能。当被问及审查是否会导致福特级航母被废弃时，费伦（Phelan）仅表示：“现在下结论还为时过早，但我们肯定会有航母。” 推文

text: Get up from your knees and wipe your mouth The cross was sent by Lebanese in Israel who escaped there before 2000 and are members of this town which the IDF soldiers destroyed its cross. It was not donated by Israel or the Jews. Easy to fool clowns https://x.com/i/status/2046664776307355926
text_zh: 从你的膝盖上站起来，擦擦你的嘴。这个十字架是由在2000年之前逃往以色列的黎巴嫩人送来的，他们是这个城镇的成员，而以色列国防军士兵摧毁了它的十字架。它不是由以色列或犹太人捐赠的。小丑真好骗 https://x.com/i/status/2046664776307355926

text: ❗️ Israel kidnapped an injured Hezbullah fighter who successfully retreated from Bint Jbeil towards the town of Ein Ebl, a Christian town loyal to Israel in Lebanon. He was to be transferred back to Lebanese territory in a Red Cross ambulance stationed in Rmeich, but the locals in Ein Ebl handed him over to the Israeli army He has been taken into Israel. There is possibly more fighters in Bint Jbeil and the red Zone
text_zh: ❗️ 以色列绑架了一名受伤的真主党战士，他成功地从宾特朱拜勒撤退到黎巴嫩境内忠于以色列的基督教城镇艾因埃贝尔。他本应被转移回黎巴嫩领土，并由驻扎在拉梅什的红十字会救护车接走，但艾因埃贝尔当地人将他交给了以色列军队，他已被带往以色列。在宾特朱拜勒和红色区域可能还有更多战士。

text: 🇺🇸 🇨🇩 🇦🇫 Washington to Dump Loyal Afghan Allies in War-Torn Congo . In a move that critics are calling a profound betrayal of international trust, the Trump administration is reportedly negotiating to deport roughly 1,100 Afghan nationals—who risked their lives to serve American interests—to the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). This decision marks the final collapse of an initiative intended to provide sanctuary to those who enabled the decades-long US occupation of Afghanistan. Having served as the "boots on the ground" for American forces, these interpreters and their families now find themselves discarded by the very empire they helped sustain. @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇨🇩 🇦🇫 华盛顿将在饱受战争蹂躏的刚果抛弃忠诚的阿富汗盟友。在一项被批评者称为对国际信任的深刻背叛的举动中，据报道，特朗普政府正在谈判将大约1100名冒着生命危险为美国利益服务的阿富汗国民驱逐到刚果民主共和国（DRC）。这一决定标志着一项旨在为那些促成美国对阿富汗长达数十年占领的人提供庇护的倡议彻底崩溃。这些翻译人员及其家人曾作为美军的“地面部队”服役，如今却发现自己被他们曾经帮助维持的帝国所抛弃。 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarTranslated At night, Syzran in the Russian Federation came under drone attack. Eyewitnesses in the city captured footage of UAVs flying over residential buildings. In the background, the operation of Russian occupation air defense systems can be heard. There are reports that the drones flew over a building located three kilometers from the oil refinery. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 夜间，俄罗斯联邦的塞兹兰遭到无人机袭击。城中的目击者拍摄了无人机飞越住宅楼的画面。背景中可以听到俄罗斯占领军防空系统的运作声。有报道称，无人机飞越了一座距离炼油厂三公里的建筑物。推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF Chief of Staff at Israel's Independence Day ceremony: "These prolonged years of fighting reshaped Israel's security and strengthened our existence." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046871917672432068/photo/1 tweet

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 Since morning, Iranians have struck a second large container ship in the Gulf of Oman. Meanwhile, Trump states that he does not intend to lift the blockade and, against the backdrop of the economic crisis caused by financial losses, indirectly hints at a potential uprising caused by the unpaid Iranian police and military. tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 自今早以来，伊朗人在阿曼湾袭击了第二艘大型集装箱船。与此同时，特朗普表示他不打算解除封锁，并且在金融损失导致的经济危机背景下，间接暗示了由未领到工资的伊朗警察和军队可能引发的起义。推文

text: And a final word about the reservists: They are very challenged, and that is an understatement. The attendance rate is 80%+, but we must not let these percentages obscure the situation: - A reservist company commander who was threatened with being fired at work - was forced to not attend this round this tim - When the company commander could not attend either, they were forced to disperse the battalion's companies among other battalions - A soldier who left Lebanon for a job interview in the center of the country, admitted that he hides in interviews the fact that he is a combat reservist - so as not to harm his chances of acceptance. They need help, and they need more people to come under the stretcher with them. Especially now, when the State of Israel still has hundreds of square kilometers of a new security zone to protect. END
text_zh: 关于预备役人员的最后一点说明：他们面临着巨大的挑战，说“挑战”都算是轻描淡写了。出勤率虽然在80%以上，但我们绝不能让这些百分比掩盖了实际情况：- 一位预备役连长在工作中受到解雇威胁，被迫无法参加这一轮行动；- 当连长也无法参加时，他们被迫将营属连队分散到其他营中；- 一名士兵为了在国家中部参加工作面试而离开黎巴嫩，他承认在面试中隐瞒了自己是战斗预备役人员的事实，以免影响被录用的机会。他们需要帮助，需要更多人来和他们一起分担重任。尤其是在现在，以色列国仍有数百平方公里的新安全区需要保护。结束

text: 4/ The terrain was also challenging: the weather was very difficult in the first few days. The troops fought in a flood, "mud as high as the tank's turret," and fog. "It wasn't easy even for the veterans, but on the second and third day we learned - and even in the mud, everything worked. That's how we learned best The commanders refuse to call the area a "security zone," but rather a "security space," and explain the differences: This time there will be fewer posts and the forces will be mobile, and this time the population is not allowed to return - and the forces will not be required to distinguish between enemy and civilian. The challenge will remain with the Christian villages - who have already begun coordinating food and supply convoys.
text_zh: 4/ 地形也充满挑战：头几天天气非常恶劣。部队在洪水中作战，“泥浆没过坦克炮塔”，还有大雾。“即使对老兵来说也不容易，但在第二天和第三天我们学会了——即使在泥泞中，一切也都运转正常。这就是我们学到的最好经验。”指挥官们拒绝将该地区称为“安全区”，而是称其为“安全空间”，并解释了其中的区别：这次哨所会更少，部队将保持机动，而且这次不允许居民返回——部队也不需要区分敌方和平民。挑战依然存在于基督教村庄——他们已经开始协调食品和补给车队。

text: 3/ The nature of the fighting this time was a little different: Hezbullah did not retreat, but sent hundreds of terrorists to southern Lebanon in the first few days. The effective weapons were explosive drones and anti-tank missiles. Dozens every day. "Their weapons are good, but in terms of courage and daring, they have a lot to learn even from Hamas. They hardly went out to fight," the commanders say.
text_zh: 3/ 这次战斗的性质略有不同：真主党并没有撤退，而是在头几天向黎巴嫩南部派遣了数百名恐怖分子。有效的武器是爆炸性无人机和反坦克导弹。每天都有几十枚。“他们的武器不错，但在勇气和胆量方面，他们甚至有很多地方需要向哈马斯学习。他们几乎没有出来战斗，”指挥官们说。

text: One of the most prominent tasks of the forces on the ground is the destruction of villages and buildings. The IDF says it is only destroying "terror infrastructure," In effect, they are destroying everything Division 162 alone, one of five operating in Lebanon, has already destroyed more than 640 structures. The commanders explain: A year and a half ago, the IDF cleared the first line of villages, and then Hezbollah established its own companies in the second and third line of villages - and therefore it is necessary to act on them now. "The next time they want to prepare, it will be in Tyre," said one of the commanders .
text_zh: 地面部队最突出的任务之一是摧毁村庄和建筑物。以色列国防军称其仅在摧毁“恐怖基础设施”，实际上，他们摧毁了一切。仅在黎巴嫩行动的五个师之一的第162师，就已经摧毁了640多座建筑。指挥官们解释说：一年半前，以色列国防军清理了第一线村庄，随后真主党在第二和第三线村庄建立了他们自己的连队——因此现在有必要对这些地方采取行动。“下一次他们想准备时，就会是在提尔了，”其中一位指挥官说。

text: 🇪🇺 🇮🇱 EU foreign ministers reject proposal to suspend association agreement with Israel . A part suspension was tabled by Ireland, Spain and Slovenia but did not receive enough backing from other member states The EU remains split on imposing sanctions on Israel, despite some member states criticising the country over the plight of Gaza and violence against Palestinians by Israeli settlers in the West Bank. Kaka Kallas, the EU foreign embarrassment policy chief, said proposals for a part suspension of the EU-Israel association agreement remained on the table but required states to shift their positions to come into force. Speaking after a meeting between EU foreign ministers, she told reporters: “We didn’t see that today, but these discussions will continue.” Supporting the genocide of the Palestinian people is what the Brusselian elites know best. @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 🇮🇱 欧盟外交部长拒绝了暂停与以色列结盟协议的提议。爱尔兰、西班牙和斯洛文尼亚提出了部分暂停的建议，但没有得到其他成员国的足够支持。尽管一些成员国因加沙的困境以及以色列定居者在西岸对巴勒斯坦人的暴力行为而批评以色列，但欧盟在对以色列实施制裁的问题上仍然存在分歧。欧盟外交政策负责人卡娅·卡拉斯（Kaja Kallas）表示，部分暂停欧盟-以色列结盟协议的提议仍然摆在桌面上，但需要各国改变立场才能生效。在欧盟外交部长会议后，她告诉记者：“我们今天没有看到这一点，但这些讨论将继续下去。”支持对巴勒斯坦人民的种族灭绝是布鲁塞尔精英们最擅长的事情。@DDGeopolitics

text: And another thing that could not be ignored: the fighters who are in Lebanon today are the second generation of Lebanese. Almost every fighter I asked replied that his father fought in '82 or '06, and is now fighting in the Fourth Lebanon War. One of them said: "I think my son will also fight in Lebanon, unfortunately. There is no escape."
text_zh: 还有一点不容忽视：今天在黎巴嫩的战士是黎巴嫩战争的第二代。我问过的几乎每一位战士都回答说，他的父亲曾在82年或06年参战，而现在他正在参加第四次黎巴嫩战争。其中一人说：“不幸的是，我想我的儿子将来也会在黎巴嫩作战。这是无法逃避的。”

text: 2/ I asked the reservists (each of whom had served hundreds of days in reserve since the beginning of the war): Has the threat to the residents of the north been removed? And they replied : "We tend to believe that it has not." This voice is important to hear, because it does not come only from Kiryat Shmona - but also from Aita a-Sha'ab
text_zh: 2/ 我问预备役人员（他们每个人自战争开始以来都在预备役中服役了数百天）：对北部居民的威胁消除了吗？他们回答说：“我们倾向于认为并没有。”这个声音很重要，因为这不仅来自谢莫纳城（Kiryat Shmona），也来自艾塔阿沙布（Aita a-Sha'ab）。

text: 🧵 Quoted as is from Israeli media: First tour of the new security zone in Lebanon: 1/ The commander of the Nahal Brigade, Col. Arik Moyal, welcomed us in Aita al-Sha'ab with a smile, and spoke of a "sense of victory" - "We can walk around here safely, before the ceasefire we wouldn't dare stick our heads out because Hezbullah sends explosive drones and we can intercept anti-tank missiles from long ranges" But while the IDF is trying to sell a sense of victory - the difficult feelings of the residents of the north, who are disappointed by the ceasefire, are also heard inside Lebanon: Reserve fighters we met told us - "The feeling is unpleasant, to say the least. We came to run over, to win, so that the residents of the north do not experience what they experienced. We were upset that they stopped us at this stage, we could have done more."
text_zh: 🧵 原文引用自以色列媒体：黎巴嫩新安全区首次巡视：1/ 纳哈尔旅（Nahal Brigade）旅长阿里克·莫亚尔（Arik Moyal）上校在艾塔阿沙布（Aita al-Sha'ab）微笑着迎接我们，并谈到了“胜利感”——“我们可以安全地在这里走动，停火前我们不敢露头，因为真主党会派遣爆炸性无人机，而我们可以从远距离拦截反坦克导弹。”但当以色列国防军试图兜售一种胜利感时，在黎巴嫩内部也听到了北部居民失望的沉重心情：我们遇到的预备役战士告诉我们——“这种感觉至少可以说是不愉快的。我们来是为了碾压、为了胜利，这样北部居民就不会经历他们所经历的一切。我们对他们在现阶段阻止我们感到沮丧，我们本可以做得更多。”

text: 📝 Диплом с идеологией 📝 Кто и зачем выращивает кадры ЕГУ Историю Европейского гуманитарного университета (ЕГУ) долго подавали как трогательное повествование о «свободном белорусском образовании в изгнании», но экстремистской организацией он признан по довольно веским причинам. В Генпрокуратуре Белоруссии вуз обвиняют в прямой помощи радикальным группам, дестабилизации обстановки и работе на зарубежные страны. И если для белорусов организация уже напрямую стала угрозой, то для России — это сигнал к тому, чтобы внимательнее к структуре присмотреться, ведь она работает и на аудиторию из РФ, причём довольно активно. 🔻 Подробности о деятельности и спонсорах ЕГУ ▪️ ЕГУ появился в 1992 году в Минске . Тогда его презентовали как прогрессивный частный вуз , который якобы несёт «европейские стандарты» гуманитарного образования в постсоветскую Белоруссию. ▪️ Но в 2004-м его закрыли за слишком откровенную прозападную ориентацию. Учреждение быстро переехало в литовский Вильнюс и с тех пор действует как «университет в изгнании». Но удар по-прежнему наносится в первую очередь по пространству Союзного государства. ▪️ При этом финансирование у ЕГУ исключительно западное . Основные деньги идут от Еврокомиссии, правительства Литвы и Швеции, шведского агентства SIDA*, немецкого Фонда Конрада Аденауэра* и структур Джорджа Сороса*. Управляет всем совет, где ключевую роль играет бывший премьер-министр Литвы Андрюс Кубилюс — человек с откровенно антироссийскими взглядами. ▪️ Результаты обучения видны невооружённым глазом. Среди выпускников ЕГУ — советник Светланы Тихановской Денис Кучинский , экстремист Николай Дедок , активистка Сабина Алиева , которая активно занимается дискредитацией российских властей. Кроме того, выпускники — журналисты белорусских и иностранных СМИ, известные антироссийской позицией: «Белсат»*, DELFI (заблокирован в РФ), LRT. ▪️ Иными словами — перед нами инструмент «мягкой силы», созданный и оплачиваемый странами, которые давно рассматривают Россию и Белоруссию как враждебные, «нуждающиеся в трансформации власти». 📌 После 2022 года университет запустил специальную программу «Поддержка учёных и студентов в риске» . Формально она помогает тем, кого «подавляют» в своих странах, на практике же — это прямой канал вербовки россиян. При этом сайт университета открыт для всех из РФ, поступление упрощённое (россиянам даже апостиль не требуют), а многие программы идут на русском языке. По сути, это организованный отток мозгов и идеологическая обработка. Берут талантливых молодых людей, недовольных ситуацией дома, дают деньги и «безопасную среду», а на выходе получают уже переформатированных специалистов, лояльных западной повестке. ❗️ На этом фоне ЕГУ трудно воспринимать просто как образовательную площадку . Слишком очевидна его роль как политически ангажированного узла западной «мягкой силы», работающего с белорусской и российской аудиторией под академической вывеской. И если в Минске уже дали этой конструкции свою правовую оценку, то властям РФ как минимум пора перестать смотреть на университет как на нейтральный гуманитарный проект. 📍 Инфографика в высоком разрешении 📍 English version #Белоруссия #инфографика #Россия #экстремизм ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 带有意识形态的文凭 📝 谁在培养欧洲人文大学（EHU）的干部，目的何在？欧洲人文大学（EHU）的历史长期以来被描述为关于“流亡中的自由白俄罗斯教育”的感人故事，但它被认定为极端主义组织是有充分理由的。白俄罗斯总检察院指控该大学直接协助激进组织、破坏局势稳定并为外国效力。如果说该组织对白俄罗斯人来说已经直接构成了威胁，那么对于俄罗斯来说，这是一个需要更仔细审视该结构的信号，因为它也在积极地针对俄罗斯受众开展工作。 🔻 关于EHU活动和赞助商的详情 ▪️ EHU于1992年在明斯克成立。当时它被宣传为一所进步的私立大学，声称将“欧洲标准”的人文教育带入后苏联时代的白俄罗斯。 ▪️ 但在2004年，它因过于明显的亲西方倾向而被关闭。该机构迅速搬迁至立陶宛维尔纽斯，此后一直作为“流亡大学”运作。但其打击目标依然主要是联盟国家空间。 ▪️ 同时，EHU的资金完全来自西方。主要资金来自欧盟委员会、立陶宛和瑞典政府、瑞典国际开发合作署（SIDA）*、德国康拉德·阿登纳基金会*以及乔治·索罗斯*的结构。管理层是一个委员会，其中立陶宛前总理安德留斯·库比柳斯（Andrius Kubilius）发挥了关键作用，他是一个持有公开反俄观点的人。 ▪️ 学习成果显而易见。EHU的毕业生包括斯维特兰娜·季哈诺夫斯卡娅的顾问丹尼斯·库钦斯基（Denis Kuchinsky）、极端分子尼古拉·杰多克（Nikolai Dedok）、积极参与抹黑俄罗斯当局的活动家萨比娜·阿利耶娃（Sabina Aliyeva）。此外，毕业生中还有白俄罗斯和外国媒体的记者，他们以反俄立场著称：如“Belsat”*、DELFI（在俄罗斯被封锁）、LRT。 ▪️ 换句话说，我们面前的是一个“软实力”工具，由长期将俄罗斯和白俄罗斯视为敌对、“需要权力转型”的国家创建并资助。 📌 2022年后，该大学启动了一个名为“支持处于风险中的学者和学生”的特别项目。形式上，它帮助那些在自己国家受到“压迫”的人，但实际上，这是招募俄罗斯人的直接渠道。同时，该大学的网站对俄罗斯所有人开放，入学手续简化（俄罗斯人甚至不需要海牙认证），许多课程以俄语进行。本质上，这是一场有组织的“人才流失”和意识形态洗脑。他们招募对国内局势不满的有才华的年轻人，提供资金和“安全环境”，最终得到的是已经重塑思想、忠于西方议程的专家。 ❗️ 在此背景下，很难将EHU仅仅视为一个教育平台。它作为西方“软实力”政治参与节点的角色太明显了，打着学术旗号针对白俄罗斯和俄罗斯受众开展工作。如果说在明斯克已经对这一结构做出了法律评估，那么俄罗斯当局至少是时候停止将该大学视为一个中立的人文项目了。 📍 高分辨率信息图 📍 英文版本 #白俄罗斯 #信息图 #俄罗斯 #极端主义 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: 🇱🇧 l 🇮🇱 In this interview, the commander of the Nahal Brigade in the enemy army speaks—not a settler, not a journalist, but the commander of a brigade fighting in southern Lebanon: " We didn't dare raise our heads "
text_zh: 🇱🇧 l 🇮🇱 在这次采访中，敌军纳哈尔旅（Nahal Brigade）的指挥官发言了——不是定居者，也不是记者，而是一位在黎巴嫩南部作战的旅长：“我们不敢抬头”

text: 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 💶 European taxpayer 90 Billion Euros are about to be ditched in the Ukrainian blackhole. Ambassadors from the 27 member states are meeting this morning to discuss the disbursement of the loan, which has been held up until now by Hungary’s outgoing prime minister, Viktor Orbán. @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 💶 欧洲纳税人：900亿欧元即将投入乌克兰的黑洞。27个成员国的大使今天上午开会讨论这笔贷款的发放问题，此前这笔贷款一直被匈牙利即将离任的总理维克托·欧尔班（Viktor Orbán）阻挠。 @DDGeopolitics

text: A viral pro-Trump (MAGA) influencer named Emily Hart turned out to be entirely AI-generated, created by a 22-year-old medical student in India. He used tools like Google Gemini to design a persona targeting conservative audiences, quickly gaining millions of views and thousands of followers. He monetized it through merch and paid platforms (like Fanvue), earning thousands per month with minimal effort. The account was eventually removed for fraudulent activity. Source: NY Post
text_zh: 一位名为艾米丽·哈特（Emily Hart）的网红特朗普支持者（MAGA）被发现完全是由人工智能生成的，由印度一名22岁的医学生创建。他使用谷歌Gemini等工具设计了一个针对保守派受众的人设，迅速获得了数百万次观看和数千名粉丝。他通过周边商品和付费平台（如Fanvue）将其货币化，以极小的努力每月赚取数千美元。该账户最终因欺诈活动被删除。来源：纽约邮报

text: Nuno Felix RT @gerardtbaker : C’mon man: Unconditional surrender. Regime change. Partnership with regime for tariffing the strait. Close the strait. Open the strait. No nukes. Some nukes. No missiles. Some missiles. Civilization wipeout. Ceasefire. War. Peace. And if all that fails, we’ll take the JCPOA If I were president (ha), I’d give a short, crisp speech saying what our goals in the Iran war are. What is our purpose, and how will we know whether we have achieved it? I’m supposed to study foreign affairs for a living — and I don’t know the answers. (Do you?) - Jay Nordlinger tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @gerardtbaker ：拜托老兄：无条件投降。政权更迭。与政权建立伙伴关系以对海峡征收关税。关闭海峡。开放海峡。不要核武器。要一些核武器。不要导弹。要一些导弹。文明毁灭。停火。战争。和平。如果这一切都失败了，我们就接受《联合全面行动计划》（JCPOA）。如果我是总统（哈），我会发表简短而干脆的演讲，说明我们在伊朗战争中的目标是什么。我们的目的是什么，我们如何知道是否已经实现了目标？我本职工作是研究外交事务——但我不知道答案。（你知道吗？）- Jay Nordlinger 推文

text_zh: 开源情报 叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉（Ahmad al-Sharaa）在访问沙特阿拉伯后抵达多哈。作为更广泛的海湾之行的一部分，预计他将与卡塔尔埃米尔塔米姆·本·哈马德·阿勒萨尼会面。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046854226198843476/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Egypt offered to host Israel-Lebanon talks in Sharm el-Sheikh, but the proposal has not received clear U.S. approval, according to Al-Akhbar. Lebanese President Joseph Aoun prefers the meetings stay in Washington and rejected Egypt and Europe as alternatives. His team says the U.S. needs to be a direct guarantor. Egypt and France have both told Lebanon it should want non-American parties involved, arguing Washington naturally favors Israel. - Al-Akhbar tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 据《Al-Akhbar》报道，埃及提议在沙姆沙伊赫主办以色列与黎巴嫩的会谈，但该提议尚未获得美国的明确批准。黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）倾向于将会议留在华盛顿，并拒绝了埃及和欧洲作为替代方案。他的团队表示，美国需要成为直接担保人。埃及和法国都告诉黎巴嫩，它应该希望非美国方参与，并指出华盛顿自然偏袒以色列。- Al-Akhbar 推文

text: WarMonitor Court filings indicate Trump had planned to tear down the East Wing at least two months in advance, but never disclosed it publicly. (WaPo) tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 法庭文件显示，特朗普至少提前两个月就计划拆除东翼，但从未公开披露。 (WaPo) 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇴🇲 An Iranian gunboat opened fire on a commercial vessel near the Strait of Hormuz about 15 nautical miles northeast of Oman, causing heavy damage to the ship’s bridge, according to UKMTO. All crew were reported safe and no fire or environmental damage…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 UKMTO reports a cargo ship was fired upon about 8 nautical miles west of Iran, leaving the ship stopped in the water with all crew safe and no damage reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇴🇲 据英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）称，一艘伊朗炮艇在阿曼东北约15海里处的霍尔木兹海峡附近向一艘商船开火，导致该船舰桥严重受损。据报道，所有船员均安全，没有发生火灾或环境破坏……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 UKMTO报告称，一艘货船在伊朗以西约8海里处遭到射击，导致该船停在水面上，所有船员安全，未报告受损。@wfwitness
